title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Agnes
Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I think it's time you give up and drink my new
concoction. I promise you, a whole new
experience awaits.
choice_data_list:
That claw machine over there also looks
promising!

That claw machine over there also looks
promising!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't try to change the subject—oh, wait, this
might be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's eyes glow dimly as she looks at
the claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What is essential to winning a prize in a claw
machine? That's right—reaction time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This drink is loaded with ingredients that
stimulate the A10 cell group within the brain's
reward system, which as a result, will enhance
your concentration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Drink this and you can consider all the prizes
yours! Now, hurry! Chug! Chug!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You really make things difficult, my little guinea
pig! Oh, and if the results aren't good, I'll have
you try a different drink! All clear?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
